outline.headline: Q1 2026 Business Review
outline.message: This deck covers Q1 2026 financial results, operational highlights, key risks, and the H1 hiring plan for executive review.

outline.headline: Agenda
outline.message: We will cover revenue performance, margin expansion, segment highlights, operational risks, and the hiring plan.

outline.headline: Revenue Hit $29.3M, Up 18% YoY
outline.message: Q1 total revenue of $29.3M exceeded plan by 4% and accelerated growth from 14% YoY in Q4 2025.
evidence_queries: Q1 2026 total revenue figure
revenue growth year over year Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025
revenue versus plan Q1 2026 variance
Q4 2025 revenue growth rate for comparison

outline.headline: Gross Margin Expanded 210bps to 64.4%
outline.message: Infrastructure optimizations in NA and EMEA drove margin improvement, partially offset by APAC investment spend.
evidence_queries: gross margin Q1 2026 percentage
gross margin Q4 2025 for basis point comparison
infrastructure cost reduction NA EMEA Q1 2026
APAC investment spend impact on gross margin

outline.headline: APAC Is Now Our Fastest-Growing Segment
outline.message: APAC pipeline grew 31% QoQ, the second consecutive quarter of segment leadership, driven by three new enterprise logos.
evidence_queries: APAC revenue or pipeline Q1 2026
APAC quarter over quarter growth rate Q1 2026
APAC new enterprise customer logos Q1 2026
APAC growth rate comparison to NA and EMEA Q1 2026

outline.headline: Two Risks Require Board Attention
outline.message: Supplier concentration in the data pipeline and rising CAC in EMEA are the two operational risks flagged for escalation.
evidence_queries: supplier concentration risk data pipeline Q1 2026
customer acquisition cost EMEA Q1 2026 trend
CAC increase EMEA root cause analysis
data pipeline vendor dependency risk mitigation

outline.headline: H1 Hiring Plan: 18 Roles Across Three Teams
outline.message: Engineering, data science, and APAC sales headcount expansions are required to sustain current growth trajectory into H2.
evidence_queries: H1 2026 hiring plan headcount by department
engineering headcount requirements H1 2026
APAC sales team expansion plan 2026
data science hiring rationale revenue per headcount

outline.headline: Q1 Strong — Two Actions Needed Now
outline.message: Q1 exceeded revenue and margin targets; board should approve the H1 hiring plan and mandate a supplier diversification review.
